mapper.select: SELECT user_name ,user_type ,last_login_time FROM public.m_user where user_id = #{userId} and password = #{password} and status = 'active'
mapper.update: update public.m_user set token = #{token} ,expires_time = now() + interval '1 day' ,last_login_time = now() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id ,user_name ,user_type ,expires_time FROM public.m_user where token = #{token} and status = 'active'
mapper.update: update public.m_user set token = null ,expires_time = null where user_id = #{userId}
